title: Cobblemon Skyblock+
description: An extended version of the Cobblemon Skyblock modpack with extra datapacks, mods, and mons.
body:
** I DO NOT RECOMMEND PLAYING SKYBLOCK IF YOU AREN'T FAMILIAR WITH SKYBLOCK OR MINECRAFTS GAME MECHANICS AS A WHOLE **



An extended version of my other Modpack under the same name. 

Built around Cobblemon, Skyblock and a little extra, like Cobblemon Rider and with many of my own Fakemon Addons. Prioritizes late game with Item Alchemy.
